title: Shizuoka
summary:
Shizuoka can refer to:

Shizuoka Prefecture, a Japanese prefecture
Shizuoka (city), the capital city of Shizuoka Prefecture
Shizuoka Airport
Shizuoka Domain, the name from 1868 to 1871 for Sunpu Domain, a predecessor of Shizuoka Prefecture
Shizuoka Temple, a fictional temple in the 2009 video game Contra Rebirth
Shizuoka Broadcasting, a radio and television broadcaster in Shizuoka Prefecture, Japan
Shizuoka Daiichi Television, a television station in Shizuoka Prefecture, Japan
Television Shizuoka, a television station in Shizuoka Prefecture, Japan
Shizuoka Asahi TV, a television station in Shizuoka Prefecture, Japan
